title.en: Although Ye Yu is fine, Ye Tian will not let go...

content.en:
Although Ye Yu is fine, Ye Tian will not let go of the ghost fox organization.

The fall of the Water Moon Domain Ancestor could not calm his anger.

"Ghost Fox Organization, since you want to attack and kill me, then I will fulfill your wishes!"

Ye Tian stepped out of the human world in one step.

He knew that the Ghost Fox Organization had sent a lot of Supreme Domain Ancestors this time, and there were even Supreme Domain Ancestors who were not weaker than him, but he was still not afraid, after all, if he really encountered a dangerous situation, he could also mobilize the power of the Xuanxu Holy Realm to suppress the enemy.

Moreover, this fight is also an opportunity to understand your own strength, so that you can know how powerful you are now.

That's why he took the initiative to go out of the human world.

Besides, he can't stay in the human world forever because of a small ghost fox organization.

......

Outside the human realm.

When Ye Tian walked out, one of the strongest domain ancestors hidden in the dark of the Ghost Fox Organization noticed it and looked at Ye Tian one after another.

But at the moment, they are also very curious.

"Where's the Water Moon Domain Ancestor?"

Ghost Shadow Domain Ancestor and the others frowned.

The Water Moon Domain Ancestor infiltrated the human world and captured Ye Tian's family, thus luring Ye Tian out.

But now, Ye Tian is out, but the Water Moon Domain Ancestor is gone?

It's not what they planned!

That's when it happened.

Ye Tian opened his mouth and said, "The strongest domain ancestors of the Ghost Fox Organization, come out!"

As soon as these words came out, many domain ancestors of the Ghost Fox Organization were shocked.

This shows that they are exposed!

"I'm afraid the Water Moon Domain Ancestor has been exposed!"

The Ghost Shadow Domain Ancestral Voice.

But what he couldn't understand was that even if the Water Moon Domain Ancestor was exposed and the plan failed, it wouldn't fall, why didn't it come out?

And Ye Tian obviously knew that the Ghost Fox Organization was attacking him, why did he come out.

"Where's the Water Moon Domain Ancestor?"

The Ghost Shadow Domain Ancestor appeared and asked Ye Tian.

"She's dead!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

"Impossible!" "The Ghost Shadow Domain Ancestor didn't believe it, "The Water Moon Domain Ancestor is a four-star master of our Ghost Fox Organization, even the Supreme Domain Ancestor on the Battle Gate Supreme Strength List doesn't want to kill her easily, just how can you kill her, and even let her have no chance to call for help!"

He was more inclined to the Water Moon Domain Ancestor to be trapped by Ye Tian and unable to communicate.

Abrupt!

The Dark Phantom Domain Ancestor appeared from nothingness, holding a short sword in his hand, and instantly stabbed at Ye Tian.

Seeing this scene, the Ghost Shadow Domain Ancestor smiled secretly.

Even if he was discovered by Ye Tian, he would not waste time chatting with Ye Tian, the reason why he was talking nonsense with Ye Tian was just to create an opportunity for the Dark Ghost Domain Ancestor to attract Ye Tian's attention.

Then let the Dark Phantom Domain Ancestor use the strongest blow to assassinate, even if he can't kill Ye Tian, if he can hurt Ye Tian, it will not be bad.

"Holy Skill - Dark Rail!"

The body of the Dark Phantom Domain Ancestor pierced through like a black light in an instant, this speed was too fast.

The Dark Ghost Domain Ancestor was not a Saint Endowment, so the realm of this Saint Technique he cultivated was not high, but it had also reached the peak realm of entry.

However, his own strength was very strong, and his soul holy light was very rich, so the blow that erupted was naturally very terrifying, far surpassing the blow of the Water Moon Domain Ancestor.

However, Ye Tian's copying talent had long sensed the existence of the Dark Phantom Domain Ancestor.

Therefore, he naturally knew about the attack of the Dark Phantom Domain Ancestor in advance, so he reacted in time.

"Holy Armor!"

"Golden body!"

"Imperial Body!"

......

Ye Tian used a holy skill, and he didn't dare to underestimate the blow of the Dark Phantom Domain Ancestor.

Bang!!!!

Ye Tian was directly knocked away, but it was no big deal, and the Dark Phantom Domain Ancestor also flew out upside down.

"Your strength !!!"

The Dark Domain Ancestor was shocked.

Ye Tian's strength has obviously reached the combat power of the strongest domain ancestor of the Battle Gate Supreme List, and it is not an ordinary Supreme Domain Ancestor on the Supreme Strong List, at least at the level of sixty or seventy, which is not weaker than him and the Ghost Shadow Domain Ancestor at all.

"I underestimated you!"

The Dark Ghost Domain Ancestor disappeared in an instant, and he suddenly performed another holy skill - stealth!

However, this holy technique was completely restrained by Ye Tian, and there was no way to shield the exploration of the copying talent.

"Let's shoot!"

The Ghost Shadow Domain Ancestor said coldly.

Whoa!!

A Supreme Domain Ancestor appeared, and every Supreme Domain Ancestor was very powerful, and a terrifying aura permeated this area.

The human world.

One by one, the Terran Domain Ancestors were very worried, and they couldn't wait to go up and help.

But they also know very well that they and others are too weak, and going up to help is also a drag.

Moreover, Ye Tian had blocked the human world before, and they couldn't do it if they wanted to, at most they could just spy on the battle situation.

"Are they all out?

Ye Tian sneered.

Seeing Ye Tian's smile, the Ghost Shadow Domain Ancestor trembled, as if he had expected something bad.

At this moment, the power of the Xuanxu Holy Realm was blessed on Ye Tian's body.

Of course, Ye Tian would not have burst out with all the power of the Xuanxu Saint Realm, and only increased his combat power by seven or eight times.

"Five Elements Ban!"

Airplanes!!!!!!

The void was sealed, and Ye Tian did not allow any of the Ghost Fox Domain Ancestors to leave.

Subsequently, Ye Tian cast a false slash and aimed at a four-star master-level supreme domain ancestor.

Poof!

That four-star master-level supreme domain ancestor was killed in an instant.

At this moment, the Ghost Shadow Domain Ancestor and the Dark Ghost Domain Ancestor finally understood why the Water Moon Domain Ancestor did not appear, not being trapped, but being killed by Ye Tian in seconds.

If they had escaped before, Ye Tian would not have been able to kill them all.

But now, all of them appeared, and Ye Tian blocked the void again, and they had no way to escape into the void.

Puff puff!!!

A famous and powerful domain ancestor was killed by Ye Tian one by one, and the Ghost Shadow Domain Ancestor wanted to stop Ye Tian, but was seriously injured by a blow, so he could only choose to dodge and dare not rush up again.

In this way, the four-star bronze, four-star silver, and four-star gold-level members of the Ghost Fox Organization all fell, and the four-star diamonds and four-star masters also fell one after another, and there were only a few left.

In a short period of time, except for the Ghost Shadow Domain Ancestor and the Dark Ghost Domain Ancestor, the other Supreme Domain Ancestors were all wiped out.

However, Ye Tian had no injuries, no matter how powerful these Supreme Domain Ancestors' desperate attacks were before, they could only give Ye Tian a small injury, and he recovered in an instant under the effect of the Immortal Saint Technique.

"Ten Thousand Laws Domain Ancestor, we admit defeat, spare us, we are members of the four-star kings of the Ghost Fox Organization, and there are only a dozen four-star kings of the Ghost Fox Organization, if you kill us, you will definitely offend the Ghost Fox Organization completely. The Ghost Fox Organization is not as good as the Battle Gate, but it is a force that must be retribution. Once you kill us, it will inevitably attract the revenge of the Ghost Fox Organization!" the Ghost Shadow Domain Ancestor hurriedly said.

"I will repay it, unfortunately, so am I!"

Ye Tian sneered.
